C:\Users\lain\emsdk\upstream\emscripten\em++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -sMODULARIZE=1 -sEXPORT_ES6=1 -sEXPORT_NAME=createChainModule -sENVIRONMENT=web,worker -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sINITIAL_MEMORY=16MB "-sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['cwrap','ccall','getValue','setValue','UTF8ToString','stringToUTF8','lengthBytesUTF8','HEAPU8']" "-sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=['_malloc','_free','_mc_web_chain_transfer_sign_message','_mc_web_chain_username_sign_message','_mc_web_chain_to_checksum_hex','_mc_web_chain_parse_address','_mc_web_chain_sha256_hex','_mc_web_chain_validate_hex_hash']" --closure=1 -O3 @CMakeFiles\chain.dir\objects1.rsp -o chain.js @CMakeFiles\chain.dir\linkLibs.rsp
